Random number generation, time manipulation, array utilities, base64 encoding, bitset operations, buffer management, CRC calculations, date functions, dictionary operations, attribute management, graphics utilities, HDLC encoding, Intel HEX encoding, legacy checksum, LRU cache, macro definitions, memory buffer management, network utilities, PackBits compression, Pascal string handling, ratio manipulation, byte reversal, shared circular buffer, sparse length encoding, statistical calculations, string list management, integer swapping, base64 test script, unit conversions, and platform utilities.

## Folders
- **[rand](rand/README.md)**: Random number generation functions using TinyMT with unique seeds for apps and workers.
- **[time](time/README.md)**: License terms and functions for time manipulation, timezone handling, and time conversions.

## Files
- **[array.c](array.c.md)**: Function to remove null elements from an array and update its size.
- **[array.h](array.h.md)**: Defines macros for checking array indices and a function to remove null elements from an array.
- **[base64.c](base64.c.md)**: Base64 encoding and decoding functions for character data.
- **[base64.h](base64.h.md)**: Functions for base64 encoding and decoding in C.
- **[bitset.c](bitset.c.md)**: Counts the number of set bits in a given bitset.
- **[bitset.h](bitset.h.md)**: Helper functions for manipulating bitsets of various widths, including set, clear, update, and get operations.
- **[buffer.c](buffer.c.md)**: Functions for creating, managing, and manipulating a buffer in the Pebble firmware.
- **[buffer.h](buffer.h.md)**: Defines a Buffer structure and functions for buffer manipulation, including add, remove, and check operations.
- **[crc32_lut.py](crc32_lut.py.md)**: Generates a CRC32 lookup table for 4-bit values and prints it in a C-style array format.
- **[crc8.c](crc8.c.md)**: Implements CRC-8 checksum calculation with support for big-endian and little-endian data.
- **[crc8.h](crc8.h.md)**: Functions to calculate an 8-bit CRC for a byte sequence with optional big-endian processing.
- **[date.c](date.c.md)**: Functions to check leap years and get the maximum days in a month.
- **[date.h](date.h.md)**: Functions for leap year calculation and determining maximum days in a month.
- **[dict.c](dict.c.md)**: Implements dictionary operations for serialization, deserialization, and merging of key-value pairs.
- **[dict.h](dict.h.md)**: Key/value serialization and parsing utilities for Pebble firmware, including data structures and functions for dictionaries, tuples, and tuplets.
- **[generic_attribute.c](generic_attribute.c.md)**: Functions to find and add attributes in a generic attribute list.
- **[generic_attribute.h](generic_attribute.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing generic attributes in a list.
- **[graphics.h](graphics.h.md)**: Functions for extracting and setting pixel values in an image buffer at specific coordinates and bit depths.
- **[hdlc.c](hdlc.c.md)**: Implements HDLC streaming decode and encode functions with error handling.
- **[hdlc.h](hdlc.h.md)**: Defines constants and functions for HDLC encoding and streaming decoding.
- **[ihex.c](ihex.c.md)**: Encodes data into Intel HEX format using a custom IHEXRecord structure.
- **[ihex.h](ihex.h.md)**: Intel HEX utilities for encoding records with specified type, address, and data.
- **[legacy_checksum.c](legacy_checksum.c.md)**: Software implementation of a legacy checksum emulating STM32F2/F4 CRC peripheral behavior.
- **[legacy_checksum.h](legacy_checksum.h.md)**: Calculates a legacy checksum for data using a modified CRC-32 algorithm for backward compatibility.
- **[legacy_checksum_crc_table.py](legacy_checksum_crc_table.py.md)**: Generates a static CRC lookup table using a 32-bit polynomial for legacy checksum calculations.
- **[lru_cache.c](lru_cache.c.md)**: Implements an LRU cache with functions to initialize, flush, get, and put cache entries.
- **[lru_cache.h](lru_cache.h.md)**: Implements a simple LRU cache with functions to initialize, retrieve, add, and flush items.
- **[macro.h](macro.h.md)**: Defines macros for concatenating two tokens in C.
- **[mbuf.c](mbuf.c.md)**: Manages memory buffers with allocation, deallocation, and chain management functions.
- **[mbuf.h](mbuf.h.md)**: Header file for a basic implementation of mbufs for networking, including functions for managing mbuf chains.
- **[mbuf_iterator.c](mbuf_iterator.c.md)**: Implements an iterator for MBuf structures with functions to read and write bytes.
- **[mbuf_iterator.h](mbuf_iterator.h.md)**: Defines an MBufIterator structure and functions for iterating over and manipulating MBuf data.
- **[net.h](net.h.md)**: Network byte-order conversion functions and types to prevent implicit casting in C.
- **[pack.h](pack.h.md)**: Macros to convert 4-character strings into 32-bit values for comparison.
- **[packbits.c](packbits.c.md)**: Implements a function to unpack data encoded with the PackBits compression algorithm.
- **[packbits.h](packbits.h.md)**: Function to unpack data using the PackBits algorithm.
- **[pstring.c](pstring.c.md)**: Functions for creating, manipulating, and printing Pascal strings and serialized arrays in C.
- **[pstring.h](pstring.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for handling Pascal strings and serialized arrays.
- **[rand.h](rand/README.md.h)**: Header file for generating 32-bit random numbers and bounded random integers.
- **[ratio.h](ratio.h.md)**: Defines functions for manipulating 32-bit ratios, including multiplication, division, and conversions.
- **[reverse.h](reverse.h.md)**: Implements functions for byte and bit reversal operations on 16-bit and 32-bit integers.
- **[shared_circular_buffer.c](shared_circular_buffer.c.md)**: Implementation of a shared circular buffer with client management and subsampling capabilities.
- **[shared_circular_buffer.h](shared_circular_buffer.h.md)**: Implements a shared circular buffer with support for multiple read clients and subsampling capabilities.
- **[sle.c](sle.c.md)**: Sparse length encoding (SLE) decoding functions for initializing and processing encoded data.
- **[sle.h](sle.h.md)**: Defines a structure and functions for initializing and decoding a buffer using SLEDecodeContext.
- **[stats.c](stats.c.md)**: Functions for calculating basic statistics, including median and weighted median, on integer arrays.
- **[stats.h](stats.h.md)**: Defines functions and types for basic statistical calculations on integer arrays, including filtering and weighted median.
- **[stringlist.c](stringlist.c.md)**: Functions for managing a list of strings, including counting, retrieving, and adding strings.
- **[stringlist.h](stringlist.h.md)**: Defines a `StringList` structure and functions to manage serialized arrays of NULL-terminated strings.
- **[swap.h](swap.h.md)**: Defines an inline function to swap two 16-bit integers.
- **[test_base64.sh](test_base64.sh.md)**: Shell script to compile and run unit tests for base64 encoding and decoding.
- **[units.h](units.h.md)**: Defines macros for unit conversions including frequency, data size, distance, and time.
- **[util_platform.c](util_platform.c.md)**: Utility functions for logging, debug serial output, and assertion handling in the Pebble firmware.
